summary: All 4 daemon_status tests passed. VAL-API-002 assertion confirmed: DaemonStatus command returns structured response with uptime, active_connections, version, MCP health statuses, and cost tracking summary. MCP health shows _status: pending placeholder. Cost fields are coherent (remaining_budget = total_budget.saturating_sub(total_spent)).

testsValidating.validates: DaemonStatus returns coherent values with zero tasks
DaemonStatus returns version, MCP health placeholder, and coherent cost fields
DaemonStatus correctly tracks tasks by state
